nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Terrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name, in S Lincs and E Anglia a variant of   Torrington   (2).
2  English: locative name in N England from Terrington (NR Yorks).

variants.name: Tarrington
meanings: 1  English: locative name, variant of   Torrington  .

2  English: locative name, perhaps sometimes from Tarrington (Herefs), but there is no clear link between the 1379 example and the 18th-century Staffs and Lancs name cited below, which may instead belong with (1).

variants.name: Torrington
meanings: 1  English: locative name, mainly from Black, Great, or Little Torrington (Devon).

2 English: in Lincs and E Anglia from East or West Torrington (Lincs), recorded as Terintone in 1086 and Tiringtuna about 1115, or from Terrington (Norfolk), recorded as Tirintuna between 1103 and 1131.

nameMeanings.name: Gilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Priscilla  , associated chiefly with the Liverpudlian singer and TV personality  Cilla Black  (  b. 1943 ), whose real name is  Priscilla White .

en.lifeSummary: Mrs Gilla de Terrington was born in 1222, in England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir William de Terrington. She died in 1303, in her hometown, at the age of 81.
